name: Mannadium Torrid
name_jp: マナドゥム・トリッド
desc: If you control "Visas Starfrost" or a monster with 1500 ATK/2100 DEF, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Mannadium Torrid" once per turn this way. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Mannadium" Tuner from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Mannadium Torrid" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control "Visas Starfrost" or a monster with 1500 ATK/2100 DEF, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Mannadium Torrid" once per turn this way. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Mannadium" Tuner from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Mannadium Torrid" once per turn.
eff: If you control "Visas Starfrost" or a monster with 1500 ATK/2100 DEF, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Mannadium Torrid" once per turn this way. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Mannadium" Tuner from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Mannadium Torrid" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
